title: New Feature exporting link column;  to actual links instead of text
excerpt: So I feel this is more of a bug or missed requirement than a new feature, but here we go.  Can you PLEASE have links display as links when the board is exported to csv/excel.  Not sure why it downloads as text instead of…

posts.author: HarveyHeise (Harvey Heise)
posts.cookedHtml: So I feel this is more of a bug or missed requirement than a new feature, but here we go. Can you PLEASE have links display as links when the board is exported to csv/excel. Not sure why it downloads as text instead of what the column actually is, a link.
